body.title: Docs-live-in-code rollout: remaining load-bearing subsystems (checklist)
body.result: Closed per Akien 2026-05-03: audit infrastructure (audit_runner.py + day-close-audit) covers the standing concern. No separate ticket needed.
body.description:
Follow-up to T-docs-live-in-code (pilot shipped 2026-04-20 on reading_tool.py). Rolls the same docs-in-code standard across other load-bearing subsystems. Rather than 11 separate tickets, this one tracker holds the checklist — each subsystem ticks off as its canonical docstring lands.

## Rollout opportunity rule

Promote a subsystem NEXT TIME its primary file is touched. Don't schedule dedicated docstring sprints — that's make-work. The conversion is cheap when context is already loaded.

## Checklist (load-bearing subsystems)

- [x] reading — reading_tool.py (T-docs-live-in-code pilot, 2026-04-20)
- [ ] cortex — wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py. Needs: long-term memory model, memory_type semantics, scope field usage, activation_count discipline, tsvector search, ring memory, parent_id conventions. HIGH leverage.
- [ ] inference_gateway — wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py. Needs: tier ladder (habit→local→OR-cheap→OR-deep), prompt_role split (interactive/analysis), escalation gate, budget metering, cache semantics. HIGH leverage — OR burn rate depends on this.
- [ ] pe_chain — wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (or wherever pe_entry_init + friends live). Needs: the coding-engram chain (CODE_INIT → PROBE → READ → PLAN → FILTER → HYPOTHESIZE → IMPLEMENT → CLAIM → OBSERVE → CLOSE), MCPCALL/BRANCHIF/FORKIF/SPAWNIF primitives, cursor_runtime, basket conventions. HIGH leverage — touched every sprint.
- [ ] comms — wild_igor/igor/comms/ + transports. Needs: Uhura-console model, channel routing envelope shape, transport registry (Discord/Matter/Gmail/etc.), comms:// URIs, message shape contract.
- [ ] scope_guard — wherever it lives. Needs: pre-write guards, inertia enforcement, re-attempt-loop semantics (see T-scope-guard-reattempt-loop).
- [ ] reasoners — wild_igor/igor/cognition/reasoners/base.py + subclasses. Needs: reasoner contract, OpenRouter reasoner, local Ollama reasoner, prompt_role threading, response shape.
- [ ] narrative_engine — wherever NE lives. Needs: arc/context builder, TWM + ring + active goals + milieu intake, output shape.
- [ ] milieu — wild_igor/igor/cognition/milieu.py. Needs: state model (arousal/valence), diffusion, propagation rules, boredom threshold integration.
- [ ] consolidation — wherever consolidation lives. Needs: FACT_CLOUD → topology pass, co-occurrence edge strengthening, sleep phases.
- [ ] reading_worker_pool — PLACEHOLDER in memory palace. Needs: stream-of-blocks queue, local/cloud worker split, backpressure.
- [ ] sleep_memory_auditor — PLACEHOLDER. Needs: prior_version_of wiring for reading memory supersession.

## Scope for this ticket

Not a single sprint — a standing rollout. Check items off over time. Close this ticket when the checklist is empty OR when a review deems the remaining items not worth the cost.

## Not in scope

- Non-load-bearing utilities (per CLAUDE.md rule, these stay terse)
- Retroactive DSB file rewrites — DSBs stay as historical log

## Provenance
Spun out 2026-04-20 during T-docs-live-in-code pilot close. Bundle with D-workflow-overhaul-2026-04-20 (docs standard is part of that workflow reshape).

**Affected files:** top-of-file docstrings across load-bearing subsystems (per checklist in description). As subsystems are touched in normal sprint work, the docstring conversion ships alongside. Files include: wild_igor/igor/cognition/*, wild_igor/igor/memory/*, wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (when next legitimately touched), wild_igor/igor/network/*, lab/utility_closet/* — see in-ticket checklist.

**Design rules:** docs-in-code (this IS the rule being rolled out); no debris (don't add docs to files not being touched in this sprint).

**Scope boundary:** IN — the subsystems on the checklist, converted opportunistically. OUT — exhaustive rewrite of all docstrings; non-load-bearing files; one-off scripts.

**Test plan:** no automated test — verification is the docstring being there + matching code. Each subsystem update is a normal commit; checklist tracks completion.
